sharedEntities.description: Core domain entity representing loans with attributes like ID, status, and amount; defined in Contracts, persisted in DbModel, and exposed through WebApi
Entity that purchases loans, defined in Contracts and stored in DbModel
Financial institution that originates or services loans, defined in Contracts and stored in DbModel
Marketplace lender entity that purchases loans from banks, defined in Contracts and stored in DbModel
Groups multiple loans for bulk processing, defined as BatchInfo in Contracts, persisted in DbModel, and managed through WebApi
Represents movement of loans between entities or accounts, stored in DbModel and exposed through WebApi endpoints

dataFlows.name: Loan Purchase Flow
dataFlows.description: End-to-end process where an MPL purchases loans from a bank
steps: WebApi processes purchase and creates Transfer records
TransferOutbox ensures reliable processing of transfers
Receipt (from Contracts) generated to confirm purchase

dataFlows.name: Interest Accrual Flow
dataFlows.description: Daily calculation and application of interest to loans
steps: System calculates interest using SofrRate from Contracts
Interest is recorded in InterestHistory in DbModel
InterestHistory is updated in the database

dataFlows.name: Fee Collection Flow
dataFlows.description: Process for collecting various fees related to loan servicing
steps: Volume fees are processed via VolumeFeeOutbox

integrationPoints.description: WebApi reads and writes loan, account, and transaction data to the database via DbModel entities
WebApi uses data contracts from Contracts for consistent data exchange with external systems
WebApi integrates with bank systems for loan origination and servicing information
WebApi stores reports and documents in S3 storage
Various outbox tables ensure reliable message delivery to external systems for transfers, fees, batches, and notifications

patterns.description: Used for reliable message delivery to external systems, ensuring transactional consistency between database changes and message publishing
Common data models defined in a shared contracts library to maintain consistency across services
Encapsulates database access through entity models and contexts
Exposes domain functionality through RESTful endpoints

ambiguities: Cos.Lending.Selling.DbModel: The relationship between LoanAccount and the Account entity is unclear - whether it's a join table or serves another purpose
COS.Lending.Selling.WebApi: The specific business rules governing when loans can be transferred between accounts are not explicitly defined
Cos.Lending.Selling.Contracts: The calculation methodology for SofrRate and how it affects interest calculations is not fully documented
COS.Lending.Selling.WebApi: The exact workflow for resolving Discrepancies identified between loan and reference data is not defined
Cos.Lending.Selling.DbModel: The lifecycle management of the LoanEvent entity and what triggers various event types is not explicit
